The '''''Titavian IV''''' was an exploration ship used by the [[Intergalactic Zoological Society]]. It was named after the [[titavian]] species of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

==Characteristics==
The vessel had holding pens for alien wildlife and was built with several landing bays.

==History==
Around [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], it was attacked and its crew killed, possibly by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] or [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] privateers. Some time later [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], being hunted by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and [[Tol Skorr]], found the wreck when he emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], hiding on it. They followed him, [[Spacing/Legends|spacing]] his [[Skorp-Ion|personal ship]] and releasing [[seeker]] droids against him.

[[File:GrievousPickup-Republic71.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Grievous arrives at the wreck of the 'Titavian IV'']]
He was rescued when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] arrived, lured by Vos' old Jedi distress signal. The two [[Duel on the Titavian IV|defeated]] the droids and evaded the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|dark Jedi]] and the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] they released, eventually escaping in Vos' fighter after destroying the Separatist ship and returning to the [[Battle of Rendili]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] soon arrived to rescue the Dark Jedi, taking Skorr back to [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] for an accounting while Ventress left for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], intent on dealing with Vos, but finding [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] instead.
